highlights.text: I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “The bull case Monday is that ES can do some back-testing of the zones we broke down yesterday and today.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “ My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
It then goes “elevator down” and sells hard through every level, for minutes to hours.
Then, it puts in my core setup: The Failed Breakdown, which in turn ignites a short squeeze.
On Friday at 230PM, ES put in a massive Failed Breakdown of a low at 6245.
We had the full sequence here: ES lost 6374, sold to 6240, put in a Failed Breakdown, backtested 6374, then sold yesterday.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a Failed Breakdown we had right off the Sunday open at 6255 (provided in advance) which caused the 120+ point Monday rally.

post_title: Is SPX Heading Back To The Highs Again? August 7 Plan
